title: So does Shinji like Asuka
wikitext:
[]: So does Shinji like Asuka?             Quote Post by Lord Tyreal » Wed Aug 18, 2004 10:08 pm So does Shinji like Asuka? or is it vice versa

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed Aug 18, 2004 10:43 pm Yes he does

[]:             Quote Post by houtaru » Wed Aug 18, 2004 10:48 pm I think so, but its debatable wether he just 'lusted' after her or liked her beacuse she had a similar past to his (he probably didn't know her past, but felt like she had similar pain). He also admired her drive and wished he could be as strong as her. I think she liked him too (saved her life twice) for similar reasons. (Well, not the 'lusting' one. lol) She admired that he was so naturally good at anything he tried (cooking, eva, viola). But then again, because they've been hurt by life and everyone they've ever loved, they may hate the fact that they like each other(Did that make sense?). They just dont want to get hurt so bad again. It just seems to me that in Eva everyone longs for somone but doesn't reveal it until the last mintue (if at all).

[]:             Quote Post by Kiel » Thu Aug 19, 2004 9:18 am As hard as it is to admit for me (I'm a Shinji/Rei fan myself) I believe Shinji liked Asuka. For anyone who watched EOE, I think it would be kinda obvious. :shock: despite the graphic nature of their so called "relationship" in EOE. Now whether Asuka liked Shinji back...that, my friend, is the question.

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Thu Aug 19, 2004 2:04 pm Of course he likes her. But the question is did he really love her? I think he did. And Shinji plays cello not viola.

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Thu Aug 19, 2004 3:47 pm coff wrote: Of course he likes her. But the question is did he really love her? I think he did. And Shinji plays cello not viola.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Aug 19, 2004 3:55 pm I think they loved each other, but being as young as they were and the hell they were going thru, they didn't know how to really express it.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Thu Aug 19, 2004 6:38 pm I'm kind of positive that Asuka liked Shinji. I wasnt too sure about him for a while, since he seemed to blush around any female that looked at/spoke to him. However, it started to become a little more apparent that he had some kind of feelings, directed towards Asuka in particular, near the end and in End of Eva...

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Thu Aug 19, 2004 6:41 pm i think he liked her...the series however, didnt provide much time to show him love her... she may have liked him back: talking to him and telling him about her family but she was always restricted by her mental barriers...

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Aug 21, 2004 6:58 pm Shinji most likely liked her if not loved her weather Asuka liked him back is another story altogether She may have but she also probably thought that love was for weak people or the fact that he seemed to be a spineless little wimp which he isn't (it would take guts to face off against the angel's or just to get in an eva they not much different than the Angel's themselves)

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Sat Aug 21, 2004 7:59 pm imo, Shinji doesn't like anyone. But obviously, Asuka does like Shinji.

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Aug 21, 2004 8:16 pm if Shinji doesn't like Asuka then why did he go to the hospital and mastubate over her comatose body answer me that

[]:             Quote Post by max3000 » Sat Aug 21, 2004 8:28 pm That has already been answered before :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by coff » Sat Aug 21, 2004 8:44 pm ChronoX wrote: if Shinji doesn't like Asuka then why did he go to the hospital and mastubate over her comatose body answer me that

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sat Aug 21, 2004 9:04 pm Then why would he bother to go to one of the places he hates the most just to jerk off then

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sat Aug 21, 2004 9:59 pm Because Rei was dead, Kaji was dead, Misato was no where to be found for Shinji and his dad, Gendou would never help Shinji. So Shinji went to the only person that was avalible. Then he accidently ripped Asuka's shirt open, and his lust overcame all. (no pun intended)

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Sat Aug 21, 2004 11:07 pm ChronoX wrote: if Shinji doesn't like Asuka then why did he go to the hospital and mastubate over her comatose body answer me that

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Sun Aug 22, 2004 8:47 am Oh....opps.....Rei wasn't dead. My bad.

[]:             Quote Post by kosure » Sun Aug 22, 2004 9:11 am ChronoX wrote: Then why would he bother to go to one of the places he hates the most just to jerk off then

[]:             Quote Post by ChronoX » Sun Aug 22, 2004 12:06 pm i need to watch the series it has been too long since i have seen an episode if only i could get my pakage soon
